description: Use this API to specify or return the page length limit and device name for one of the four output devices. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = lines_per_page_one_device(device, ival) ierr, ival,devnam = lines_per_page_one_device(device)
python_syntax: ierr = lines_per_page_one_device(device, ival) ierr, ival,devnam = lines_per_page_one_device(device)

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Indicates which of the four devices is to be processed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the lines per page option setting of the device corresponding to device. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, no change by default; else output).

device.description: for the first primary hard copy output device.
for the second primary hard copy output device.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
